description: Sanity check on controlled natural language to evaluate structural stability under perturbation and shuffle baseline.

interpretation.structured_signal: strong structural coherence preserved under transformation
interpretation.perturbed_signal: reduced coherence due to relational degradation
interpretation.random_signal: near-zero structural signal after baseline removal

notes.limitations: single controlled domain; not a universal validation
next_steps: cross-domain validation (time series, code, LLM outputs)
robustness testing under varying perturbation intensities
